interestingFact: Home to the Grand Canyon and the largest economy in the world.
Has more lakes than any other country, with over 31,000 large lakes.
Famous for the Amazon Rainforest, the largest rainforest on Earth.
Home to the world-famous Stonehenge and the monarchy.
Known for its beer culture and the world’s first automobile.
Famous for the Eiffel Tower and the culinary art of fine dining.
Hosts the Taj Mahal and is the largest democracy in the world.
Known for cherry blossoms, Mount Fuji, and advanced technology.
Famous for the Great Barrier Reef and unique wildlife like kangaroos.
Has three capital cities and is known as the 'Rainbow Nation'.
